## Checklist
- [ ] SVG uses 24x24 viewBox
- [ ] Follows stroke width / style rules in STYLE_GUIDE.md
- [ ] Uses `currentColor`
- [ ] Cleaned with SVGO (no unnecessary code)
- [ ] Added entry to `icons/registry.json`
- [ ] File named in kebab-case with category prefix
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint:icons` and it passes
